response.justification: Strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack experience, but the resume shows no executive leadership track record, no evidence of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+, and only minimal exposure to agentic AI (recent MCP tooling work at re:cinq). Fintech experience is limited to ~1 year at RIDE Capital, and there is no demonstrated production multi-agent AI system, no distributed-systems leadership at scale, and no regulated AI operations experience required for a CTO role.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering career across web, backend, mobile, and embedded systems
Some recent exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: No executive or senior leadership role; entire career is IC-level (Senior/Staff Engineer)
No demonstrated experience scaling teams, hiring, or building technical leadership layers
Minimal fintech depth and no production multi-agent AI systems in regulated environments

key_factors.factor: No production multi-agent AI systems track record
